title: Allow Admins to restore comments that have been edited or deleted
excerpt: It would be great if admins had the ability to restore or see the details of comments that have been edited or deleted.

posts.author: kknause (Kaitlyn Knause)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if admins had the ability to restore or see the details of comments that have been edited or deleted.

posts.author: Will_from_Pro_Backup (Will Dewulf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kknause , just FYI - Pro Backup for monday.com allows you to look up & restore previous versions of comments on tasks.

Disclaimer: I am product owner at Pro Backup.
